overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player character exploring the 'Sunset Motel' during a heavy rainstorm. The character exits a vehicle, approaches the derelict motel, ascends an external staircase, and walks along the second-floor balcony while observing the rain-soaked wasteland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict motel parking lot in heavy rain

events.description: exits the black SUV and begins walking through the rain toward the motel
approaches the Sunset Motel entrance from the parking lot

agents.ego_description: moving through the rain-soaked parking lot toward the Sunset Motel entrance, passing a green parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the motel entrance doorway

entered.detail: dark colored vehicle with open door that the player exits from
large orange art deco dome with illuminated SUNSET lettering on top of the motel building
green truck parked in the lot with roof rack
tall modern street lamp illuminating the rainy scene

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-soaked parking lot with the player exiting a black SUV. The iconic Sunset Motel with its distinctive orange dome dominates the view ahead. Heavy rain creates reflections on the asphalt as the player approaches the building entrance, passing a green parked truck.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor motel corridor with room doors

events.description: moves from open parking lot to covered ground floor walkway under the motel overhang
approaches the external metal staircase at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the ground floor past motel room doors 210 and 211, approaching the external staircase

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground leaning against the wall near room 210

entered.detail: green motel room door with number 210 and small window
metal external staircase with railings leading to the second floor
red and white striped concrete barrier near the stairs
illuminated neon sign reading CHOOH in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving under the motel's overhang for shelter from the rain, the player walks along the ground floor corridor passing green room doors numbered 210 and 211. A person sits against the wall near room 210 as the player approaches the external metal staircase at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: external metal staircase leading to second floor

events.description: begins ascending the external metal staircase to the second floor
reaches the top of the stairs and steps onto the second floor walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wet metal stairs while passing an NPC descending, then emerging onto the roof-level walkway

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs downward as the player ascends
two individuals standing and conversing at the top of the stairs near a green dumpster

entered.detail: wet metal staircase with diamond plate treads and blue railings
large green industrial dumpster at the top of the stairs
metal safety railing along the edge of the second floor walkway

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the slippery external metal staircase, passing a descending pedestrian. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens onto the second-floor walkway where two NPCs stand near a green dumpster conversing. The rain continues to fall heavily on the exposed stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: second floor motel balcony walkway with vending machines

events.description: passes by a group of NPCs congregated near vending machines
passes under an illuminated green neon OPEN sign casting colored light

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked second floor balcony, passing various NPCs, vending machines, and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the wall smoking near a vending machine
person walking ahead along the walkway wearing a blue jacket

entered.detail: blue and white vending machine with illuminated product display and BIG advertisement
wooden wall with white graffiti tags and markings
green neon arrow sign with OPEN text pointing to a doorway
tall palm tree visible in the distance through the rain

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered second-floor walkway, the player passes motel room doors and a blue vending machine. The corridor features graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. NPCs lounge against the walls and converse as the player passes under a glowing green neon OPEN sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of motel balcony overlooking wasteland road

events.description: slows and turns to look out over the railing at the wasteland landscape below
view opens up to reveal the surrounding wasteland, distant buildings, and a road below

agents.ego_description: pausing at the end of the walkway to observe the rain-soaked wasteland, distant structures, and vehicles on the road below

notable_agents.action: dark colored vehicle driving along the dirt road below the balcony

entered.detail: muddy dirt road winding through the wasteland with tire tracks
derelict structures and shacks visible through the rain and fog
tall water tower structure silhouetted against the gray sky
concrete barrier with red and white stripes along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Reaching the end of the walkway, the player looks out over the metal railing at the expansive wasteland below. A muddy road winds through the desolate landscape where a vehicle drives through the rain. Distant derelict buildings and a water tower are barely visible through the heavy rain and fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked parking lot into the claustrophobic corridors of a derelict motel, finally opening up to a desolate wasteland vista. It begins with the player exiting a black SUV and approaching the orange-domed Sunset Motel through heavy rain and asphalt reflections. As the camera moves under the building's overhang for shelter, it passes green room doors and a seated figure before ascending a slippery metal staircase. The scene then shifts to the second-floor walkway, gliding past graffiti-covered walls, a blue vending machine, and a glowing green neon sign while NPCs lounge in the corridor. Finally, the camera reaches the end of the balcony and looks out over the railing, where the enclosed architecture gives way to a wide, foggy expanse of muddy roads and distant derelict buildings.
